headline: Parrot Learns To Use Alexa, Now Controls The Smart Home And Demands Constant Entertainment
summary: 'Alexa, play jazz,' the parrot says. 'Alexa, turn off the lights.' He's now the boss of the house.
fullBody: Polly the parrot learned to use Alexa. She now controls the entire smart home. 'Alexa, play jazz,' Polly says at 6 AM. 'Alexa, turn off the lights.' Polly is now the household manager. 'I'm just a guest in my own home,' her owner said. Polly has started ordering items. 'Alexa, order seeds,' Polly says. Polly now has a delivery schedule. 'She's very organized,' the owner said.
